docs.title: BRIMSTONE PROJECT
docs.text: Welcome to the Brimstone Project documentation portal.

docs.title: About
docs.text:
Brimstone Project is a centralized archive for:

  • Cybersecurity projects
  • Research notes
  • Experimental software
  • Networking tools
  • Reverse engineering labs
  • CTF writeups
  • Technical documentation

docs.title: Objectives
docs.text:
• Build publicly
  • Document everything
  • Maintain long-term research archive
  • Track engineering growth

docs.title: Categories
docs.text: Category Description WEB Web exploitation REV Reverse engineering CRYPTO Cryptography FORENSICS Digital forensics NETWORK Networking OSINT Open-source intelligence

docs.title: Description
docs.text: A wireless signal mapping and heatmap visualization tool.

docs.title: Goals
docs.text:
• Learn packet capture
  • Study signal propagation
  • Build visualization system
